title: NGE Marathon in Japan
wikitext:
[]: NGE Marathon in Japan?             Quote Post by cyharding » Tue Dec 15, 2015 11:16 pm I don't know if I read the google translate right, but it looks like they're going to have a marathon of the series on New Year's eve starting around noon. http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-4270.html

[]: Re: NGE Marathon in Japan?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Dec 16, 2015 4:11 am That's what I'm reading too. There's an article up on NicoLive, which I presume is the service that's going to be hosting it: http://live.nicovideo.jp/watch/lv244618115

[]: Re: NGE Marathon in Japan?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Dec 30, 2015 4:16 pm Apologies for the double post. The Eva official twitter made a post about the marathon: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Starts Thursday at noon on NicoLive. Only viewable in Japan, of course. It looks like they're just doing episodes 1-26 and not EoE this time. Still a pretty cool way to ring in the new year! They also posted this: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) It says something about Eva and the NHK Red and White Song Battle. I'm guessing there'll be an Eva-related song in it? Edit: According to ANN, there's a special anime songs version that will feature Cruel Angel's Thesis sung by Sayuri Ishikawa and miwa. Neat!

[]: Re: NGE Marathon in Japan?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Wed Dec 30, 2015 7:21 pm Sure would be nice if at the end of the marathon they decided to throw in a surprise about Final like they did with 3.0 back on New Years 2012. When we went from 2011 to 2012 they announced the third film would be named "You Can (Not) Redo". Be nice if the marathon ended with a title for the last entry. But I won't get my hopes up.

[]: Re: NGE Marathon in Japan?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Dec 30, 2015 8:29 pm Couldn't ask for a better date either. The eve of Third Impact and the end of the original series, and the final hurrah of Eva's 20th anniversary? It's perfect to advertise the "future" of the series. But like you said, no point getting our hopes up for anything like that!

[]: Re: NGE Marathon in Japan?             Quote Post by Ray » Wed Dec 30, 2015 8:30 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: But I won't get my hopes up.

[]: Re: NGE Marathon in Japan?             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Wed Dec 30, 2015 8:57 pm Ray wrote: Same.

[]: Re: NGE Marathon in Japan?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Dec 30, 2015 9:33 pm The only thing they're missing is an orange juice sponsorship!

 a surprise about Final like they did with 3.0 back on New Years 2012. When we went from 2011 to 2012 they announced the third film would be named "You Can (Not) Redo". Be nice if the marathon ended with a title for the last entry. But I won't get my hopes up.
